notes: AMTECH reviewed the standalone estimate skill: instructions are scoped to building a structured estimate from user-provided rates, it ships no scripts and requires no network or secrets, and its documented Output Format matches the published estimate schema (amtech-job-estimate/v1). The skill is use-in-context-first and never sends or invents a price. Approved for publication by AMTECH as reviewer and publisher under amtech-skill-policy/1.
